meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Coding Experience
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS.
content.answer_block: You don't need a CS degree to build profitable software. By leveraging AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can translate business logic directly into production-ready applications. Focus on solving a painful, high-value problem for a niche audience, automate the delivery, and let the AI handle the complex technical architecture.
content.intro:
The barrier to entry for SaaS founders has collapsed. For years, the 'no-code' movement promised a revolution, but it often hit a wall of limited customization and scalability. Today, we are in the era of AI-orchestrated development, where the gap between a founder's vision and a deployed product is bridged by intelligent agents that write, debug, and ship code for you.

Stop waiting for a CTO. Whether you are a domain expert with a burning problem or an entrepreneur seeking recurring revenue, your lack of technical background is no longer a liability—it is a perspective. We are going to use high-level abstractions to build a revenue-generating engine that runs while you sleep.

steps.title: Define Your Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a specific workflow problem in a B2B sector. Focus on high-frequency tasks where users are already paying for inefficient solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Generate a list of 5 high-value micro-SaaS ideas for the legal tech niche that automate document sorting. Focus on recurring revenue potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research --topic 'SaaS market gaps in legal tech document automation'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Logic
steps.description: Outline the minimum feature set required to solve the problem. Keep it lean to minimize development time and maximize speed-to-market.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical PRD for a subscription-based document sorter. Define the core user flow, database schema, and essential API integrations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --file prd.md --prompt 'Draft a functional MVP architecture for a document sorting SaaS'

steps.title: Generate the Backend Infrastructure
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold the backend, database connections, and authentication. This ensures your app is secure and production-ready from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate for a Python FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL integration and Supabase authentication. Include a structured folder architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold backend with FastAPI and Supabase auth'

steps.title: Implement the Core Revenue Logic
steps.description: Integrate Stripe to ensure your SaaS is monetized. You cannot build a business without a payment gateway.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the Stripe integration logic for a monthly subscription model. Include endpoints for creating a checkout session and handling webhook events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add Stripe checkout integration for monthly subscription plans'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Automate the deployment pipeline to ensure your app is live and accessible to users without manual server management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Vercel deployment configuration file and an instruction set for deploying the current repository to a live URL.

pro_tips: Focus on 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature parity; ship the payment flow before the dashboard UI.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic, as bugs in billing are the fastest way to lose customer trust.
Leverage existing API-first services like Supabase and Stripe; don't build infrastructure that you can rent.
Monitor your AI-generated code for 'hallucination debt' by running regular security audits via Claude Code's analysis tools.
Keep your prompt history organized; treat your chat logs as the documentation for your product's evolution.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, shift your focus entirely to distribution. Build a landing page, run cold outreach, and collect user feedback to iterate on your core value proposition.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a recurring revenue machine without writing a single line of manual code. The only difference between you and a successful founder is the decision to execute. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
